evidence_summary: Resolve the physical immobilization of the Tin Woodman through lubrication, transitioning the group dynamic from a rescue mission to an expanded traveling party.
Dorothy finds an oil-can in the Woodman's cottage. She lubricates his joints, restoring his movement. The Woodman awakens and expresses his desire to seek Oz for a heart.
From tension to relief and newfound companionship.
